name: Olive Garden Neopolitan Ziti
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 lb Sweet/hot Italian links or sausages
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the Ziti pasta until al dente.
2. Grate Parmesan cheese and chop fresh parsley bouquets.
3. Prepare the Marinara Sauce with:
- 5 cups Marinara Sauce
- 28 ounces Italian-style or plum tomatoes (with juice)
- 10 3/4 ounces Tomato puree
- 1 teaspoon Garlic, minced
- 4 tablespoons Olive oil
- 1/2 cup Fresh basil, packed and chopped
- Salt and pepper to taste
4. Bake or pan-fry the sausages until fully cooked, then drain and cool.
5. Halve the sausages and cut into 1-inch slices.
6. Sauté the bell peppers in olive oil over moderate heat until their crispness is lost but they are not soft.
7. In a heavy saucepan, combine the tomatoes, tomato puree, garlic, olive oil, and fresh basil. Bring to a light simmer on moderate heat.
8. Add the sautéed pepper strips and cooked sausage slices, then heat for 3 to 5 minutes.
9. Serve the pasta topped with sausage, peppers, and Marinara Sauce, garnished with parsley bouquets. Pass Parmesan cheese.
